title: "Happening under your nose": Supreme Court slams MP, Rajasthan officials over illegal sand mining
description: After the recent death of a forest guard who was hit by a tractor suspected to have been used by sand mining mafia in Madhya Pradesh's Morena, the Supreme Court today came down heavily on State authorities for failing to curb illegal sand mining in the Chambal sanctuary region.A Bench of Justices Vikram Nath and Sandeep Mehta questioned the very existence of State machinery if it is unable to protect its officers and natural resources."It is happening under your nose.
